spec_match.rationale: Builds Use-As-Dictionary header with match (UrlPattern), match-dest, type, ttl — matches the spec's directive set.

interactive.rationale: Text inputs, dest chips, URL probe rows — full builder with live match preview.

edge_cases.rationale: No path for invalid UrlPattern syntax, dictionary size limits, overlapping match patterns.

design_system.rationale: All CSS variables, badge-ok contrast is AA-fine.

openQuestions.title: Add the chromestatus link
openQuestions.detail: References missing the chromestatus link. Rule #3.

openQuestions.title: Validate UrlPattern syntax inline
openQuestions.detail: Invalid UrlPattern strings should be flagged rather than emitting a broken header.

openQuestions.title: Test conflicting match patterns
openQuestions.detail: Show longest-match precedence when two dictionaries' match patterns overlap.
